name: Qualifying Gasification Project Credit

eligibility.description: Available to eligible entities in industries like chemicals, fertilizers, or steel that employ gasification technology. Requires certification and must meet fuel input requirements.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Investment tax credit of 20% (or 30% for high-sequestration projects) for the basis of eligible property in a qualifying gasification project.
